context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 70 verified all changes: 1) Showcase has 6 project cards (БАНЯ, ХОЛ, ХОЛ+КУХНЯ, СПАЛНЯ, ДЕТСКА, ЦЯЛ АПАРТАМЕНТ) with correct pricing (69/119/199 EUR). 2) 'Как работи AI Дизайнерът?' section with Camera/Palette/Check icons. 3) Pricing section displays 69/119/199 EUR correctly. 4) Companies page has 'Как работи?' info with 3 numbered steps. 5) Register page has only 2 tabs (Клиент, Фирма/Майстор) - no Designer. 6) Showcase scroll buttons work. 7) All showcase images load from /showcase/before_*.jpg and /showcase/after_*.jpg.
